title: SBA Communications (SBAC) Soars 16.7% QTD: Will the Trend Last?

title: Is it Wise to Retain SBA Communications (SBAC) Stock for Now?
text: SBA Communications (SBAC) is likely to benefit from the rising global demand for wireless connectivity and its asset buyouts. Yet, notable customer concentration and high interest rates are key woes.

title: SBA Communications' (SBAC) Q3 AFFO Beat, '23 View Raised

title: SBA Communications Corporation Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results; Updates Full Year 2023 Outlook; and Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: BOCA RATON, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SBA Communications Corporation (Nasdaq: SBAC) ("SBA" or the "Company") today reported results for the quarter ended September 30, 2023. Highlights of the third quarter include: Net income of $85.4 million or $0.80 per share AFFO per share of $3.34 Site leasing revenue of $637.5 million, representing 8.5% growth over the prior year period Repurchased 0.5 million shares cumulatively in the third quarter and subsequent to quarter end In addition, the Company anno.
